response:
To compute the **sample variance** of the data set:

$$
\{-22, 22, 11, -19, 8, 7\}
$$

---

### Step 1: Find the mean (average) of the data set

$$
\text{Mean} = \frac{-22 + 22 + 11 - 19 + 8 + 7}{6}
$$

$$
= \frac{(-22 + 22) + (11 - 19) + (8 + 7)}{6}
$$

$$
= \frac{0 - 8 + 15}{6} = \frac{7}{6} \approx 1.1667
$$

---

### Step 2: Subtract the mean from each data point and square the result

$$
\begin{align*}
(-22 - \frac{7}{6})^2 &= \left(-\frac{143}{6}\right)^2 = \frac{20449}{36} \\
22 - \frac{7}{6} &= \frac{127}{6} \Rightarrow \left(\frac{127}{6}\right)^2 = \frac{16129}{36} \\
11 - \frac{7}{6} &= \frac{55}{6} \Rightarrow \left(\frac{55}{6}\right)^2 = \frac{3025}{36} \\
-19 - \frac{7}{6} &= -\frac{121}{6} \Rightarrow \left(-\frac{121}{6}\right)^2 = \frac{14641}{36} \\
8 - \frac{7}{6} &= \frac{37}{6} \Rightarrow \left(\frac{37}{6}\right)^2 = \frac{1369}{36} \\
7 - \frac{7}{6} &= \frac{35}{6} \Rightarrow \left(\frac{35}{6}\right)^2 = \frac{1225}{36} \\
\end{align*}
$$

---
